name: Pixel Speedrun
short_description: A simple platformer that challenges you to improve your time with each run. Control the pixel through different difficult levels and avoid the obstacles. Compare each of your runs with your personal best at the end of your run.
detailed_description:
Hi!

Once a small project, now on Steam!

A few years ago I made a game that had found great favor in the Scirra community.
With still increasing 150'000+ plays it ended up on the third page of the top games. This motivated me extremely to create a new game.

  • New/More Levels
  • New Obstacles
  • a... proper Timer
  • Endscreen Stats / Graphs to compare your run to your Personal Best

I am really happy to have made it to this point.
Thank you to everyone who supports my project!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Korean
